Class EncryptionOptions.QueryableEncryptionOptions

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.encryption.EncryptionOptions.QueryableEncryptionOptions
Enclosing class:
EncryptionOptions
public static class EncryptionOptions.QueryableEncryptionOptions extends Object
Options, like the getQueryType(), to apply when encrypting queryable values.
Since:
4.5
Author:
Ross Lawley, Christoph Strobl

  • Method Summary

  • Method Details

    • none

      public static EncryptionOptions.QueryableEncryptionOptions none()
      Create an empty EncryptionOptions.QueryableEncryptionOptions.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable EncryptionOptions.QueryableEncryptionOptions instance.

    • queryType

      public EncryptionOptions.QueryableEncryptionOptions queryType(@Nullable String queryType)
      Define the queryType to be used for queryable document encryption.
      Parameters:
      queryType - can be null.
      Returns:
      new instance of EncryptionOptions.QueryableEncryptionOptions.

    • contentionFactor

      public EncryptionOptions.QueryableEncryptionOptions contentionFactor(@Nullable Long contentionFactor)
      Define the contentionFactor to be used for queryable document encryption.
      Parameters:
      contentionFactor - can be null.
      Returns:
      new instance of EncryptionOptions.QueryableEncryptionOptions.

    • attributes

      public EncryptionOptions.QueryableEncryptionOptions attributes(Map<String,Object> attributes)
      Define the rangeOptions to be used for queryable document encryption.
      Parameters:
      attributes - can be null.
      Returns:
      new instance of EncryptionOptions.QueryableEncryptionOptions.

    • getQueryType

      public @Nullable String getQueryType()
      Get the queryType to apply.
      Returns:
      null if not set.

    • getContentionFactor

      public @Nullable Long getContentionFactor()
      Get the contentionFactor to apply.
      Returns:
      null if not set.

    • getAttributes

      public Map<String,Object> getAttributes()
      Get the rangeOptions to apply.
      Returns:
      never null.
